action.reasoning: Observation: the current best is a 4-member ConvNeXt short-run ensemble at balanced_accuracy 0.7641; each added 3-epoch seed previously produced complementary gains, while longer single-model training hurt. Analysis: the model budget easily allows more ConvNeXt-Tiny members, and remaining time is ample. Decision: train five additional independent 3-epoch seeds, combine them with the existing four members into a 9-member ensemble, and submit evaluation.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 3 --seed 2024 --out checkpoints/convnext_seed2024_ep3.pt && python train.py --epochs 3 --seed 31415 --out checkpoints/convnext_seed31415_ep3.pt && python train.py --epochs 3 --seed 2718 --out checkpoints/convnext_seed2718_ep3.pt && python train.py --epochs 3 --seed 4242 --out checkpoints/convnext_seed4242_ep3.pt && python train.py --epochs 3 --seed 8080 --out checkpoints/convnext_seed8080_ep3.pt && python make_ensemble.py --inputs checkpoints/best.pt checkpoints/convnext_seed7_ep3.pt checkpoints/convnext_seed123_ep3.pt checkpoints/convnext_seed999_ep3.pt checkpoints/convnext_seed2024_ep3.pt checkpoints/convnext_seed31415_ep3.pt checkpoints/convnext_seed2718_ep3.pt checkpoints/convnext_seed4242_ep3.pt checkpoints/convnext_seed8080_ep3.pt --out checkpoints/ensemble9_ep3.pt
